name: Console Table Aged Oak - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring natural warmth and elegance to your home with this Console Table from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Featuring a rectangular silhouette with a 30.25-inch height, this wooden console table in an aged oak-finish brown has a smooth tabletop ideal for displaying decor and organizing/ keeping essentials, and it stands on two slab legs with a trestle base. Whether placed in the entryway, behind a sofa or along the hallway, the versatile table offers both style and functionality.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 60 inches
Overall Height: 30-1/4 inches
Overall Depth: 15-3/4 inches
Thickness of top panel: 1-3/8 inches
